# MegaSuperSoft

> Software made with care in New Zealand. Local-first, open source, privacy-respecting.

MegaSuperSoft is an independent software company based in New Zealand that builds local-first desktop software and games. All software is open source. User data stays on the user's device.

## Pages

- [Home](https://megasupersoft.com/)
- [Products](https://megasupersoft.com/products)
- [Downloads](https://megasupersoft.com/downloads)
- [About](https://megasupersoft.com/about)
- [Privacy Policy](https://megasupersoft.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://megasupersoft.com/terms)

## Software

- FFFFinance: Local-first personal finance for New Zealand. Bank-connected via Akahu, AI-powered, cross-platform.
- OpenComp: Open-source image compositor for VFX artists.
- NodeUI: Multimedia canvas for creative work.
- FileUI: Cross-platform file browser for artists and content creators.

## Games

- Vampire Runners: 2D roguelike arcade game. Coming to Steam.
- Renegade Cop: 3D single-player adventure RPG.
- NeverEverland: Isometric Zelda-like adventure.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/megasupersoft
- Email: hello@megasupersoft.com
